name: Chocolate Dipped Pretzels
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Hershey's Milk Chocolate Bar, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate bar and disks in a medium saucepan over low heat.
2. Keep the pan in hot water to maintain the dipping consistency.
3. Dip the pretzels, whole or half, into the chocolate.
4. Allow excess chocolate to drip off before placing them on waxed paper.
